title: New Laws to Protect the Coast
article_text: The county decided to impose new legislation to protect the ancient coast. Besides the ban on stealing, they also wanted to stop people from kicking sand and leaving trash. Unlike old rules, the new law was properly implemented via a mobile assistant. The assistant used a chart to show multiple areas that needed help. A criminal was caught trying to steal a rare plate from the coast. The police closely watched the area and rejected the latter plan. The new rules yield good results because everyone works together. I used to think that legislation was ill, but now I see its value. The government also plans to attach a fine to any illegal action. To yield better results, we need to kick the bad habits of not cleaning up.

sentences.en: The county decided to impose new legislation to protect the ancient coast.
sentences.zh: 该县决定实施新法规来保护古老的海岸。

words.eng_def: a part of a country with its own local government
to force something to be accepted or done
a law or set of laws
the land next to the sea

sentences.en: Besides the ban on stealing, they also wanted to stop people from kicking sand and leaving trash.
sentences.zh: 除了禁止偷窃，他们还希望阻止人们踢沙子和乱扔垃圾。

words.eng_def: to say that something is not allowed
to take something that is not yours
to hit something with your foot

sentences.en: Unlike old rules, the new law was properly implemented via a mobile assistant.
sentences.zh: 与旧规则不同，新法通过移动助手得到妥善实施。

words.eng_def: to put a plan or law into action
able to move or be moved easily

sentences.en: The assistant used a chart to show multiple areas that needed help.
sentences.zh: 助手用图表展示了多个需要帮助的区域。

sentences.en: A criminal was caught trying to steal a rare plate from the coast.
sentences.zh: 一名罪犯试图从海岸偷窃一块稀有盘子时被抓获。

words.eng_def: a person who does something against the law
to take something that is not yours

sentences.en: The police closely watched the area and rejected the latter plan.
sentences.zh: 警察密切监视该区域，并拒绝了后一个计划。

sentences.en: The new rules yield good results because everyone works together.
sentences.zh: 新规则产生了良好的结果，因为大家共同努力。

sentences.en: I used to think that legislation was ill, but now I see its value.
sentences.zh: 我过去认为立法是有害的，但现在我看到了它的价值。

sentences.en: The government also plans to attach a fine to any illegal action.
sentences.zh: 政府还计划对任何违法行为附加罚款。

sentences.en: To yield better results, we need to kick the bad habits of not cleaning up.
sentences.zh: 为了产生更好的结果，我们需要改掉不清理的坏习惯。

image_prompts: A county government building with a sign about new legislation to protect an ancient coast.
A beach with a 'No Stealing' sign and people kicking sand, with trash on the ground.
A person using a mobile phone app with an assistant icon, showing a law document.
A digital chart on a tablet showing multiple coastal areas marked for help.
A police officer catching a thief trying to steal a plate on a beach.
Police officers watching the beach closely, with a rejected plan paper in hand.
A graph showing positive results from new rules, with people cleaning the beach together.
A person thinking, with a thought bubble showing old bad laws and new good laws.
A government official attaching a fine sticker to a trash bag on the beach.
People kicking away bad habits (symbolized by trash) and cleaning the coast for better results.
